prompt: Professional minimal flat software logo. Dark navy blue (#1a2035) hexagon with rounded corners on white background. Inside the hexagon: ONE single continuous thick bold white line — it begins at the bottom-left as a large solid filled triangle arrowhead pointing toward bottom-left, curves smoothly into a thick line that zigzags diagonally upward toward the top-right making exactly 3 peaks (up-down-up-down-up pattern like a stock chart W shape but trending upward), then curves smoothly into a large solid filled triangle arrowhead at the top-right pointing toward top-right. It is ONE unbroken connected shape — the two arrowheads and the zigzag line in between are all one single white silhouette. Very thick bold uniform stroke. NOT two separate lines. White on dark navy. Nothing else inside. Clean flat modern.
